_meta.description: Mainstream exercise shortlist for the app. Linework icon per exercise (assets/icons/{slug}.svg); reference photos resolved from Free Exercise DB.
_meta.iconStatusLegend: icon.glyph = shared line glyph; multiple exercises may share one. Swap per-exercise later if desired.
_meta.photoSource: Free Exercise DB (Unlicense / public domain), copied locally
_meta.iconSource: Tabler Icons (MIT) + Lucide biceps-flexed (ISC). Clean line glyphs, mapped by movement/equipment; reused across similar exercises.
